meta.question: Which requirement flow-down views are defined for the APS Black Box Specification?
meta.finalAnswer:
The following requirement flow-down views are defined for the APS Black Box Specification:

1. APS Performance Requirements
2. APS Interface Requirements
3. APS Architecture Requirements
4. APS Environmental Requirements
5. APS Programmatic Requirements
6. APS Timing Requirements
7. APS Software Requirements
8. APS Product Assurance Requirements
9. APS Operational Requirements
10. APS Optical Requirements
11. CAGS Driven Requirements
12. ICD Requirements

These 12 requirement flow-down view categories (plus the parent container "02 Requirements Flow-down Views") are located under: APS > Black Box Specification > Requirements > 02 Requirements Flow-down Views

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Black Box Specification"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .

  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {

  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS%3A%3ABlack")) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .

LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "APS")) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "Requirements")) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?view), "APS::Black%20Box%20Specification::Requirements::02%20Requirements%20Flow-down%2520Views"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "02 Requirements Flow-down Views"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "02%20Requirements%20Flow-down%20Views") || CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "02%2520Requirements%2520Flow-down%2520Views"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the requirement flow-down views under the APS Black Box Specification. The query returned 13 packages under "02 Requirements Flow-down Views" that represent the different requirement categories.
